creator: dimma@higis.ru
text:
Hi Martin,

On Thu, Nov 02, 2006 at 04:41:56PM +0000, Martin Wilke wrote:

> The port does not build. Can you take a look in it?
> 
> http://miwibox.org/tb/index.php?action=describe_port&id=1117

Please, check again.

--- py24-cyruslib-0.5.shar begins here ---
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	py-cyruslib
#	py-cyruslib/pkg-descr
#	py-cyruslib/Makefile
#	py-cyruslib/pkg-plist
#	py-cyruslib/distinfo
#
echo c - py-cyruslib
mkdir -p py-cyruslib > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - py-cyruslib/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >py-cyruslib/pkg-descr << 'END-of-py-cyruslib/pkg-descr'
Xcyruslib is wrapped interface for imaplib.py, it adds support for
Xcyrus specific commands. Function naming is the same of cyradm
X
XWWW:	http://oss.netfarm.it/python-cyrus.php
END-of-py-cyruslib/pkg-descr
echo x - py-cyruslib/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >py-cyruslib/Makefile << 'END-of-py-cyruslib/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	py-cyruslib
X# Date created:		2006-10-31
X# Whom:			Dmitriy Kirhlarov <dimma@higis.ru>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=		cyruslib
XPORTVERSION=		0.5
XCATEGORIES=		mail net python
XMASTER_SITES=		http://oss.netfarm.it/download/
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
XDISTNAME=		${PORTNAME}.py
XEXTRACT_SUFX=
X
XMAINTAINER=		dimma@higis.ru
XCOMMENT=		Cyrus imapd library for Python
X
XNO_WRKSUBDIR=		yes
XUSE_PYTHON=		yes
XUSE_PYTHON_PREFIX=	yes
XBINMODE=		644
X
XPLIST_FILES=		%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/${DISTNAME}
X
Xdo-extract:
X	${MKDIR} ${WRKDIR}
X	${CP} ${DISTDIR}/${DISTNAME} ${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME}
X
Xdo-build:
X
Xdo-install:
X	${TEST} -d ${PYTHONPREFIX_SITELIBDIR} || ${MKDIR} ${PYTHONPREFIX_SITELIBDIR}
X	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME} ${PYTHONPREFIX_SITELIBDIR}/
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-py-cyruslib/Makefile
echo x - py-cyruslib/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >py-cyruslib/pkg-plist << 'END-of-py-cyruslib/pkg-plist'
X@comment $FreeBSD$
END-of-py-cyruslib/pkg-plist
echo x - py-cyruslib/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >py-cyruslib/distinfo << 'END-of-py-cyruslib/distinfo'
XMD5 (cyruslib.py) = aa87c0eb96d888563d000987e36babf3
XSHA256 (cyruslib.py) = 8a1f0758232fefb6557b269187f2aab49a5ac20f4634ca4fcef538a198480895
XSIZE (cyruslib.py) = 6679
END-of-py-cyruslib/distinfo
exit
--- py24-cyruslib-0.5.shar ends here ---
